titles.title: I'm Happy in the Lord Anyway

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A storm is raging in my life right now, But to Satan's oppression I refuse to bow; I'm gonna say to him, "Get thee behind me today, I'm happy in the Lord anyway."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm happy in the Lord anyway, And it really doesn't matter What comes my way today; I'm gonna wear a smile, Hold my head up high and say, I'm happy in the Lord anyway.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now you know, Satan He'll try to keep you down; He just loves to take your smile, And turn it upside down. But through Christ we have a power To send him on his way; You can be happy in the Lord anyway.
